规则.preview:
ENTRY ELIGIBILITY

Open to: Interior designers, architects, developers, retailers, hoteliers, restaurateurs, manufacturers, and suppliers.



Project Eligibility: Projects must have been completed between 1 January 2023 and 14th August 2026 (except for temporary projects).



Temporary Projects Eligibility: Pop-ups and temporary exhibitions must have been completed since 1 January 2024.

关于.preview:
ABOUT THE BRAND

World Interiors News (WIN) and World Architecture News (WAN) are premier online platforms dedicated to showcasing excellence in architecture and interior design from around the globe. 

For over 16 years, WIN and WAN have been the go-to destinations for design professionals seeking inspiration, practical insights and the latest trends. By bringing together innovative projects, expert perspectives, and design breakthroughs, these platforms celebrate creative vision and technical

联系.preview:
THE WORLD INTERIOR NEWS AWARDS

CELEBRATING DESIGN EXCELLENCE

The World Interiors News Awards is a prestigious global competition celebrating the best in interior design.

This annual event unites the interior design community, offering a unique platform for industry recognition, innovation and the opportunity to influence the future of design worldwide. 

Have you had a groundbreaking project across residential, commercial, or public spaces? Then make sure you enter the WIN Awards 2026.

FAQ.preview:
Frequently asked questions

We know preparing your entry takes time and thought, so we’ve put together a few frequently asked questions to help guide you through the process and craft a winning submission. 

Please download the entry kit for all information you need. 

If you have further questions please email morgan.lovegrove@haymarket.com.

WIN Awards 2026 - Judges Nomination Form

We invite you to nominate yourself or a colleague using the form below. The final judging panel will be comprised of an inclusive range of individuals to fully represent the industry. Nominations to get involved are welcome from across the sectors.

Please complete the following form to receive information about the WIN Awards 2026 judging.
